page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6.52xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ecs.re6 family. It is powered by Intel Xeon 8269CL processors, providing 208 dedicated physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The instance is equipped with 3072.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of approximately 14.77 GB per core.

This instance operates on the KVM hypervisor. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. There is no local storage bundled with this instance, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Additionally, the instance does not include any GPU hardware accelerators.

Given the massive memory footprint and high count of dedicated physical cores, this instance is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. The qualitative cost profile reflects a high-density resource allocation suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, massive data caching layers, and heavy enterprise resource planning systems. The lack of local storage and GPU acceleration represents a clear tradeoff, positioning this server specifically for memory-bound and compute-heavy workloads that rely on external storage architectures.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6.52xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by Intel Xeon 8269CL processors. Running on the KVM hypervisor, it delivers 208 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core and a massive 3072.0 GB of RAM, translating to 14.77 GB of memory per core. The instance features a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, requiring network-attached storage for data persistence. This hardware profile is designed for large-scale, memory-intensive workloads such as in-memory databases, heavy caching layers, and enterprise applications requiring substantial RAM and dedicated compute resources.
